title: SEIU Local 509 Units 8 & 10 Collective Bargaining Agreement, 2024–2026
description: Full text of the executed Collective Bargaining Agreement between the Commonwealth of Massachusetts (Human Resources Division) and the Alliance, AFSCME/SEIU, AFL-CIO (AFSCME Council 93 and SEIU Locals 509 and 888), covering Units 8 and 10 state employees. In scope here because it governs the Vocational Disability Examiner (VDE) job class at MassAbility's Disability Determination Services (DDS-Det): Appendix C lists Vocational Disability Examiner I/II/III (Unit 8, grades 20/21/23) and Chief Vocational Disability Examiner, with the master articles and salary schedules applying. The term runs January 1, 2024 through December 31, 2026. The document contains the standard CBA articles (recognition, managerial rights, union security, anti-discrimination, hours/scheduling, leave, salary, health insurance, seniority/transfer, grievance/arbitration, duration, etc.), salary-schedule and job-title appendices, and a set of department-specific Supplemental Agreements and MOUs for OTHER divisions — none specific to DDS-Det. Converted from the bundled source PDF (dds-cba-2024-2026.source.pdf).

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / Commonwealth of Massachusetts (Human Resources Division)
source.title: Collective Bargaining Agreement — Alliance AFSCME-SEIU Local 509, Units 8 & 10, 2024–2026

license: Executed public-sector labor contract (Commonwealth of Massachusetts)
notes: CONSUMPTION HAZARD: the .md is 408,770 bytes but readable CBA text ends at approximately character 384,600; everything after that is an inline PNG/base64 binary tail appended by the PDF-to-markdown conversion. Truncate at ~384,600 chars; do not ingest the binary tail. No standalone public URL is known — the canonical source is the bundled dds-cba-2024-2026.source.pdf in this folder; source.url points to the SEIU Local 509 site as authoritative publisher. SCOPE / DDS DISAMBIGUATION (corrected 2026-06-17): the VDE (Vocational Disability Examiner) provisions for DDS-Det are the MASTER Units 8 & 10 articles plus Appendix C job titles/grades (Vocational Disability Examiner I/II/III + Chief VDE, ~lines 2493-2525). There is NO DDS-Det-specific supplemental agreement. The department-specific Supplemental Agreements cover OTHER agencies/divisions and must NOT be read as DDS-Det evidence — in particular: Supplemental Agreement O (~lines 2965-3053, incl. O-1) is the DEPARTMENT OF DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICES (DDS-Dev) Human Service Coordinator caseload agreement (the 'DDS' in the contract's TOC means Developmental Services; line 2981's 'SEIU Local 509 DDS Chapter' is the DDS-Dev chapter, NOT this one); Supplemental Agreement U (~lines 3279+) is MRC but the VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION (VR) division, not DDS-Det. Chunk-level / RAG consumers should exclude or distinctly tag the Supp. O and Supp. U regions when retrieving DDS-Det material.
